title: Startup India
description: Flagship Government of India initiative supporting startups through recognition, tax benefits, networking, mentorship and easier compliance.

title: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme
description: Provides financial assistance through eligible incubators for proof of concept, prototype development and commercialization.

title: MSME Registration (Udyam)
description: Offers registered micro, small and medium enterprises access to financial assistance, subsidies and government support.

title: SIDBI Startup Assistance
description: Provides loans, venture debt, credit support and startup financing initiatives for eligible businesses.

title: Digital India
description: Promotes digital infrastructure, online services and technology adoption across India.

title: Make in India
description: Encourages manufacturing, innovation and investment in India across multiple sectors.

title: Atal Innovation Mission
description: Supports innovation, entrepreneurship, incubation and startup ecosystem development.

title: Stand-Up India
description: Provides bank loans to eligible entrepreneurs for setting up new enterprises.

title: Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises (CGTMSE)
description: Offers collateral-free credit guarantee support for eligible MSMEs through participating financial institutions.

title: Technology Development Board
description: Supports commercialization of indigenous technologies through financial assistance.

title: Biotechnology Industry Research Assistance Council (BIRAC)
description: Provides grants, funding and incubation support for biotechnology and healthcare startups.

title: National Initiative for Developing and Harnessing Innovations (NIDHI)
description: Supports technology-driven startups through incubation, grants and entrepreneurial assistance.
